title: Testmaker Question Set
description: Schema for question data files used with the Testmaker quiz engine.

name.description: Display name for the question set. Shown in the app header.

description.description: Optional description of the question set.

examInfo.description: Optional. When present, enables Exam Simulation mode in the app.

questionCount.description: Number of questions in the simulated exam.

timeMinutes.description: Time limit for the exam in minutes.

passingPercent.description: Passing score as a percentage (e.g. 75 means 75%).

categories.description: List of categories/domains. Each question must belong to one.

id.description: Unique integer identifier for this category. Used by questions[].category. MUST be an integer, not a string.

weight.description: Optional percentage weight for exam simulation. If any category has a weight, all should have weights summing to 100.

id.description: Unique identifier for this question within the file.

category.description: Must match a meta.categories[].id value. MUST be an integer, not a string.

options.description: Answer options. Keys are option labels (e.g. A/B/C/D, 1/2/3, True/False). Values are the option text. Minimum 2 options required.

correct.description: The key from options that is the correct answer (e.g. "B"). Must match a key in the options object.

explanation.description: Optional explanation shown after answering. Strongly recommended but not required.
